content: Better Auth Postgres pgTable schema (4 tables): user(id text PK, name text, email text unique, emailVerified boolean, image text, createdAt timestamp, updatedAt timestamp), session(id text PK, expiresAt timestamp, token text unique, createdAt, updatedAt, ipAddress text, userAgent text, userId text FK→user.id CASCADE), account(id text PK, accountId text, providerId text, userId text FK, accessToken, refreshToken, idToken, accessTokenExpiresAt, refreshTokenExpiresAt, scope, password text, createdAt, updatedAt), verification(id text PK, identifier text, value text, expiresAt timestamp, createdAt, updatedAt). Import from drizzle-orm/pg-core. Pass schema to drizzleAdapter: drizzleAdapter(db, { provider: 'pg', schema }). Run npx auth@latest generate to auto-scaffold. DB schema for Phase 1 also needs: pairing_tokens(id, code, userId FK, expiresAt, usedAt), devices(id, userId FK, label, platform, apiKeyHash, lastSeenAt, revokedAt, createdAt).
